subcodes.first_line: All the peoples of the world have been created to know Him Who is the All-Glorious, exalted be His majesty and dominion, and all have been [3.5s]... ...O Thou Lord of the world and Sovereign of its peoples! I beseech Thee by Thine Immemorial Essence and Everlasting Being
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اهل عالم از برای معرفت حق تعالی شانه و سلطانه خلق شده اند و جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @purpose; goal of creation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
